danger_signals.visual_form: Animated hostile sprites with distinct color palettes from player character
danger_signals.meaning: Active threats requiring avoidance or combat

danger_signals.visual_form: Spikes, moving platforms, and environmental obstacles with contrasting colors
Large-scale sprite, often filling substantial screen space with elaborate animation

safety_signals.visual_form: Floating collectibles with bright, distinct visual identity
safety_signals.meaning: Health recovery or weapon enhancement opportunities

safety_signals.visual_form: Clear, unobstructed platform routes with consistent ground coloring

faction_indicators.color_identity: Yellow/gold with rocket pack metallic accents
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Rocket Knight armor and jet-pack equipment

faction_indicators.color_identity: Dark colors, reds, purples, and grays
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Soldier types with varying equipment and size indicating hierarchy

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Fortress and military structures as stage backdrops; enemy soldiers present throughout levels
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Continuous enemy spawn patterns; patrol behaviors; coordinated attacks

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Stage design transitions from outer fortifications to inner strongholds; increasing architectural complexity
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy difficulty escalates; boss encounters mark major territorial control points

environmental_storytelling.example: Levels progress from exterior military camps and fortress walls to interior throne rooms and command centers, visually representing advance through enemy stronghold
Weaker soldier types in outer areas, stronger elite units and bosses in deeper territories, communicating power distribution and organizational structure
Industrial, military, and royal aesthetic elements reinforce the nature of occupation and political control being contested

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Predictable patrol patterns; attack when player approaches; retreat or regroup under certain conditions
Multi-phase attack patterns; larger movement ranges; telegraphed special attacks; environmental interaction
Rocket pack provides directional thrust; sword combat mechanics; mobility advantage indicated by animation fluidity

notes: Sparkster communicates world-state primarily through classic platformer visual language: enemy type and placement indicate territorial control, architectural progression shows advancement through hostile space, and boss encounters mark significant narrative/political checkpoints. The game's visual design emphasizes the Rocket Knight's technological superiority (jet pack) against conventional military forces. Limited source material available restricts deeper faction ideological analysis.
